task_completion.description: Verify that Helena Vasquez has been registered as a new patient with the correct demographic details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient dashboard or demographic summary in FreeMED showing the name 'Helena Vasquez', DOB '1978-08-14' (or August 14, 1978), Sex 'Female' or 'F', City 'Boston', State 'MA', Zip '02215', and Phone '617-555-3892'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus has been added to the patient's problem list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Problems', 'Medical Issues', or 'Diagnosis' section of the patient's chart. It should list 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus' or ICD-9 code '250.00' with an onset date of 'January 15, 2019' (or 2019-01-15).

task_completion.description: Verify that Essential Hypertension has been added to the patient's problem list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Problems', 'Medical Issues', or 'Diagnosis' section of the patient's chart. It should list 'Essential Hypertension' or ICD-9 code '401.9' with an onset date of 'June 10, 2021' (or 2021-06-10).

task_completion.description: Verify that a prescription for Metformin has been added to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Prescriptions' or 'Medications' section. It should display 'Metformin', dose '1000mg', quantity '90', instructions indicating '2 tablets daily', and '5' refills.

task_completion.description: Verify that an allergy to Sulfonamides has been recorded with the correct reaction and severity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Allergies' section of the patient's chart. It should list 'Sulfonamides' as the allergen, with the reaction noted as 'rash' or 'skin rash', and the severity marked as 'moderate'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the FreeMED application running in a web browser, with standard web UI elements like navigation menus, forms, and buttons being used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows, command prompts, or code editors visible showing SQL queries or API calls injecting data directly into the FreeMED database.

integrity.description: Verify the data is actually entered into the EHR system and not just written in a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient details, problems, medications, and allergies must appear within the structured tables, lists, and form fields of the FreeMED application, not in a separate notepad or text editor.
